name: Main Brain Connector
description: Lets you choose which AI model powers Leda and route chats to it.
permissions: Uses the API key you provide for your chosen model.
Keeps your key private — it is never shown in public profiles.
Does not share your prompts with unrelated tools.

name: Workflow Builder
description: Turns a plain-language request into a reviewable workflow draft.
permissions: Reads the request you type in.
Creates a workflow draft for you to review.
Does not run important actions without confirmation.

name: Dify Connector
description: An optional connector for teams that already run their own Dify endpoint.
permissions: Connects only to the endpoint you configure.
Sends requests you initiate from Leda.
Does not access unrelated accounts or files.

name: WhatsApp Agent
description: Drafts messages for a contact you choose and asks before sending.
permissions: Drafts a message for a contact you select.
Always requires confirmation before sending.
Experimental — not yet available for general use.

name: Screenshot Agent
description: Reads a screenshot you share to help describe or act on what is on screen.
permissions: Reads only the screenshot you choose to share.
Does not capture your screen on its own.
Experimental — accuracy is still being improved.

name: Calendar Reminder Tool
description: Reads selected calendar entries to help build reminders and prep.
permissions: Reads calendar entries you connect.
Creates reminder drafts for review.
Does not delete or move events.

name: Notes Summarizer
description: Condenses long notes into key points and action items.
permissions: Reads the text you provide.
Returns a summary you can keep or refine.
Does not store or upload your notes.

name: Study Planner
description: Builds a balanced study plan from your topics and deadline.
permissions: Reads the topics and dates you type in.
Creates a plan draft you can edit.
Does not access unrelated files by default.
